title: RandomDropMod
description: Makes every mob (and optionally blocks) drop a completely random item from the creative inventory.
body:
RandomDropMod transforms Minecraft into a chaotic, unpredictable adventure by completely overhauling how loot works. Instead of dropping their usual items, every mob now drops one completely random item from the full creative inventory — yes, that includes barriers, command blocks, spawn eggs, structure voids, and much more!

Whether you’re slaying zombies or a sheep, you’ll never know what loot you’ll walk away with. It might be a netherite sword… or a decorative block you’ve never seen before. Every encounter becomes a surprise, making gameplay wild, replayable, and full of unexpected twists.

🔧 Features:

🔀 Random Mob Drops: Every mob drops one completely random item.

🧱 Creative Inventory Access: Items include even restricted blocks like structure blocks, command blocks, and spawn eggs.

✅ Forge 1.20.1 Support: Built for stability and compatibility.

❌ No Default Drops: Mobs no longer drop their normal loot — only the random item.

💬 Commands:

/toggleMobDrops – Turn random mob drops on/off.

/toggleBlockDrops – Enable/disable random block drops (disabled by default).

[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-f16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/randomdropmod)
